mapper.insert: INSERT INTO h_portfolio_snapshot ( portfolio_id, snapshot_date, invested_amount, current_value, total_profit_loss, xirr, cagr ) VALUES ( #{portfolioId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{investedAmount}, #{currentValue}, #{totalProfitLoss}, #{xirr}, #{cagr} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE invested_amount = VALUES(invested_amount), current_value = VALUES(current_value), total_profit_loss = VALUES(total_profit_loss), xirr = VALUES(xirr), cagr = VALUES(cagr)
